decks.notes: The main goal of this deck is to maintain control over the game by using a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. By leveraging the disruptive abilities of Baleful Strix and other creatures, along with efficient removal spells and card draw engines, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver opponents until it can establish a dominant board position. With a focus on efficient and versatile cards, this UB Control deck thrives on disrupting opponents' game plans while building up its own resources to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game by utilizing the card advantage and removal spells that are characteristic of a UB Control archetype. With Baleful Strix as the commander, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage through efficient creature removal and drawing cards. By maintaining a strong control over the game, the deck seeks to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition and strategic decision-making.
